Comfortable Accommodations: Alucarni Guest House in Upington offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, work desk, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden, enjoy the year-round outdoor swimming pool, and utilise the outdoor fireplace. Additional facilities include an outdoor seating area, picnic spots, and barbecue facilities.
